title: Refactor SRP-001 (SRP): The 'Benchmark' class combines benchmark definition, preparation, execution o...

detected_issue.description: The 'Benchmark' class combines benchmark definition, preparation, execution orchestration, and error handling/reporting.
detected_issue.reasoning: This class has multiple reasons to change: if the way benchmarks are defined changes, if the preparation logic (e.g., iteration calculation) changes, if the execution flow changes, or if the error reporting mechanism changes. It acts as a 'God object' for the entire benchmarking process, rather than delegating these distinct responsibilities to separate components.

fix_logic.summary: Delegate benchmark execution to a dedicated Runner class to improve SRP
fix_logic.rationale: The Benchmark class was acting as a God object. By extracting the execution logic into a 'BenchmarkRunner' struct, we separate the definition of the benchmark from the orchestration of its execution, error handling, and reporting.
